title: Isolate Tests in a Dedicated Source Directory (Java)
description: It is a good practice to isolate test classes in a separate package so that what is shipped to production is neither polluted by nor bloated with them. Further, including unit tests in code assemblies could affect build processes.
recommendation: Isolate test classes in a separate package
impact: Avoids polluting production code with tests and potential build process issues

checks.message: Isolate test classes in a separate package
